snippet: const control = animate(paths, { pathLength: [0.18, 1, 0.62, 0.18] }, { duration: 3 }); control.pause();
animate(planes, { transform: ['translate3d(0,0,0)', 'translate3d(0,-62px,80px)', 'translate3d(0,0,0)'] }, { duration: 3 });
animate(scene, { clipPath: ['inset(0 0 0 0)', 'inset(0 49% 0 49%)', 'inset(0 0 0 0)'] }, { duration: 3 });
const controls = cards.map((card, i) => animate(card, { x: [0, offsets[i], 0], y: [0, shifts[i], 0] }, { duration: 3 }));
animate(drawer, { y: ['78%', '42%', '5%', '78%'] }, { duration: 3, ease: 'linear' });
layers.forEach(({ node, depth }) => animate(node, { x: pointerX * depth, y: pointerY * depth }, { duration: 0.24 }));
animate(blobs, { cx: clusteredX, cy: clusteredY, r: [5, 11, 5] }, { duration: 3, ease: 'linear' });
const draw = regl({ frag: displacementFragment, uniforms: { pointer: regl.prop('pointer'), time: regl.prop('time') }, count: 3 });
new p5(p => { p.setup = () => p.createCanvas(innerWidth, innerHeight); p.draw = () => stepPosterBodies(p); });
for (let ring = 0; ring < 4; ring++) drawCorollaPoints(p, center, ring, phase, pointer);
const drawFluid = regl({ frag: fluidFragment, uniforms: { time: regl.prop('time'), pointer: regl.prop('pointer') }, count: 3 });
particles.forEach(a => particles.forEach(b => applyAttractionRule(a, b, matrix[a.kind][b.kind])));
animate(card, { y: [i * 22, i * 8, i * 22], scale: [1, 1 - i * 0.035, 1] }, { duration: 3 });
animate(rail, { x: ['0%', '-50%'] }, { duration: 3 / velocity, ease: 'linear', repeat: Infinity });
animate(word, { opacity: [0.1, 1], filter: ['blur(8px)', 'blur(0px)'], rotate: [5, 0] }, { duration: 3 });
cells.forEach(cell => drawCell(p, cell, smoothstep(cell.delay, cell.delay + 0.22, progress)));
animate(bubbles, { scale: [0.2, 1, 18], borderRadius: ['50%', '50%', '0%'] }, { duration: 3 });
items.forEach((item, i) => animate(item, { scale: proximityScale(i, activeIndex) }, { duration: 0.22 }));
panels.forEach((panel, i) => animate(panel, { x: ['-102%', '0%', '102%'] }, { duration: 3, delay: i * 0.08 }));
animate(activeRail, { x: ['0%', '-50%'] }, { duration: 3, ease: 'linear', repeat: Infinity });
blobs.forEach((blob, i) => animate(blob, { cx: trail[i].x, cy: trail[i].y }, { duration: 0.18 + i * 0.08 }));
if (distance(pointer, previousSpawn) > velocitySpacing) cards.push(makeTrailCard(pointer, phase));
grid[cellIndex(pointer)].energy = 1; grid.forEach(cell => cell.energy *= 0.91);
animate(reticle, boundsToReticle(target.getBoundingClientRect()), { type: 'spring', stiffness: 420, damping: 32 });
cells.forEach(cell => drawReactiveCell(p, cell, pointerDistance(cell, pointer), clickPulse));
